name: Great Zimbabwe guided tour
summary: A licensed guide walks you through the Hill Complex, Great Enclosure, and Valley Ruins. 2–3 hours, USD 15–25 per person.

name: Lake Mutirikwi sunset cruise
summary: Late-afternoon cruise on Lake Mutirikwi — hippos, fish eagles, sundowners. Departs Norma Jeane's & Hippo Creek.

name: Kyle Game Park self-drive
summary: Self-drive game tracks around the Mutirikwi shore — white rhino, giraffe, zebra. Park entry ~USD 3.

name: Gonarezhou multi-day safari
summary: Three-to-five day 4x4 safari into Zimbabwe's wildest park. Big elephant herds, baobabs, the Chilojo Cliffs.

name: Lake Mutirikwi fishing
summary: Bream, tigerfish, and bass on Zimbabwe's second-largest lake. Hire boat with local skipper from USD 40.

name: Shona village & cultural tour
summary: Visit Mabudziya or Takaindisa village. Pottery, mbira, traditional cooking, story-telling around the fire.

name: Mushandike Sanctuary day trip
summary: Bird sanctuary 35 km from Masvingo town. 200+ species, walking trails, picnic spots.

name: Tugwi-Mukosi dam tour
summary: Visit Zimbabwe's largest inland dam — viewpoint, dam wall, growing watersport scene.

name: Masvingo nightlife crawl
summary: Sundowners at Norma Jeane's, dinner at Granez, late-night at San Siro or Club Dio. Driver included.

name: Wedding car & convoy hire
summary: Decorated bridal car plus matching convoy. Mercedes E-Class with chauffeur, plus 4–6 backup cars.

name: Airport shuttle from Harare / Bulawayo
summary: Door-to-door from RGM (Harare) or JM Nkomo (Bulawayo) into Masvingo, Great Zimbabwe and beyond.

name: Local events & festivals
summary: Independence celebrations, Heroes' Day, Harurwa season (Nerumedzo), Great Limpopo Cultural Trade Fair.
